content.en:
"How is it possible? How could Xiao Yue have so many Chaos Divine Powers!!!"

Countless True Monarchs were shocked.

Even many Dao Ancestors were surprised, after all, it took a lot of money to practice a Chaos Divine Power, and Xiao Yue had cultivated so many Chaos Divine Powers in a short period of time, and none of them were ordinary Chaos Divine Powers.

It can be said that even the transcendent forces would not spend a huge price for the divine generals to cultivate so many chaotic supernatural powers.

Under normal circumstances, even if it is passed down by the Dao Ancestor himself, he will at most specialize in two or three Chaos Divine Powers, otherwise delaying his cultivation will not mention that the cost will be too great and even shake the foundation and foundation of a force.

is as strong as the Treasure Sea Divine General, in fact, he has cultivated two Chaos Divine Powers, one is to defend against Chaos, and the other is the Infinite Divine Sea Technique to defeat a large number of Divine Generals.

This immeasurable divine sea technique is not a well-known chaotic supernatural power, and many people don't know the origin of this supernatural power, but it is obviously from the divine heaven realm, and it is a very remote supernatural power.

And the people who know the name of the immeasurable divine sea art are very rare, and most people still don't know what this magical power is called.

It is precisely because of his full efforts to study and cultivate the immeasurable divine sea technique, even if the treasure sea god general can only master the prototype of the chaotic divine power and cannot exert the power of the chaotic divine power, but he can exert a terrifying power at a multiple ladder level, and even cooperate with his own various secret techniques, which can suppress strong opponents one by one.

But Xiao Yue is completely unreasonable, and the incomparably anti-heaven magic power is displayed one by one, which is too shocking and enviable.

"Endless sinking, not good!"

The god of the sea will be shocked.

He had done his homework before he came, and he had some understanding of many of the Chaos Divine Powers known in the Divine Heaven Realm, and Endless Sinking was an incomparably anti-heaven illusion Chaos Divine Power in the Divine Heaven Realm, second only to the Divine Heaven Realm's first illusion magical power, the Land of Dreams.

And in the historical records of the shattered realm of the Divine Heaven Realm, there are extremely few geniuses who can be cultivated into endless destruction, and even a long time may not be able to have one.

There is only one reason, a cultivator must have the Sinking talent, and this talent requires an illusion talent, a soul talent, a pupil talent, and a blood moon talent.

But if you want to fuse these four talents, you must have the Crystal of Destruction, and this thing is too rare, and it will take a long time for one to be born in some forbidden places.

Because of this, the illusion magic of Endless Sinking is so rare.

But everyone never expected that Xiao Yue would have mastered the illusion magic power of Endless Immersion, which was almost difficult to practice.

"Ahhh!!!hhh

The Treasure Sea God distorted his face, and his soul was always on the verge of sinking, and the feeling was too uncomfortable.

It was as if as soon as he relaxed a little, his soul would fall into the illusion world created by the endless sinking of illusion powers, and then everything would be manipulated.

If he gave up directly, it wouldn't be painful, but he didn't want to give up, and he had been fighting against endless sinking, so this feeling was far more uncomfortable than being injured and dying.

Xiao Yue needed to maintain the Endless Fall, so she couldn't attack the Treasure Sea Divine General with all her strength, but the Treasure Sea God General couldn't maintain the Infinite Divine Sea Technique under the influence of the Endless Fall.

Suddenly, the lake and sea that spread all over the ring disappeared.

Then.

Xiao Yue directly urged a top-grade Chaos Supreme Treasure level cyan long sword, and slashed towards the Treasure Sea Divine General with a single sword.

Rumble!!!!

The Baohai God will be as if he was pierced by hundreds of millions of sword lights, and the injury was not light, and the whole person also flew out upside down and hit the shield above the ring.

But at this time, where will the treasure sea god have time to manage the injuries on his body, he can only do his best to resist the endless sinking.

Fortunately, there was still a soul treasure in his soul to protect him, otherwise he would have been pulled into the endless sinking world with a thought.

That's when it happened.

The Treasure Sea God shone the light of the Sea of Souls, and a gray flower bloomed, directly breaking Xiao Yue's endless sinking supernatural power.

Endless sinking was forced, and the treasure sea god came to his senses, but his face was extremely regretful.

He felt sorry for the gray flower, which was not actually a real flower, but a soul curiosity, and a one-time soul curiosity, a life-saving curiosity that could keep his soul from being annihilated in the future.

It can even be said that as long as it is not for Dao Ancestor to make a personal move, other strong people will not be able to annihilate his soul with one blow, and it is equivalent to a second life at a critical moment!

But now, in order to resist Xiao Yue's endless fall, he directly used this treasure.

"Xiao Yue, your endless sinking was forcibly broken by me, and you can't use it for the time being, this time you are doomed!"

The treasure sea god said coldly.

"Really?"

Xiao Yue sneered, and immediately used a soul-restoring treasure given to her by Ye Tian, the Mist Soul Fruit, which could restore soul injuries, and even restore the sequelae caused by the breaking of the soul secret technique.

As soon as the Misty Soul Fruit was taken, Xiao Yue's Endless Sinking could be used again.

At the moment when Ye Tian cast an endless sinking, the Baohai God General immediately confessed: "I admit defeat!"

He only had that one soul artifact, which had already been used up, and he couldn't resist Xiao Yue's endless sinking anymore, he didn't want to suffer that kind of pain anymore, so he directly admitted defeat.

In this way, at least lose decently, if you are trapped by Xiao Yue's endless sinking, you may be extremely embarrassed.

With the Treasure Sea God General admitting defeat, Xiao Yue only has one opponent left - the Reincarnation God General!

Once she defeats the Reincarnation God General, Xiao Yue can become the champion of this talent ancestral pool quota battle.

There are still some games ahead, and the match between Xiao Yue and the reincarnation god will be placed in the last one, which can ensure the excitement of the game.

It didn't take long for all but the last game to come to an end.

And so, the last game came.

Xiao Yue fights against the reincarnation god general!

It is not easy to say who wins and who wins, because both sides have their own advantages.

Xiao Yue is indeed very strong, and also possesses terrifying chaotic supernatural powers such as Endless Fall, Extreme Yin Holy Sword, Eternal Spear, Eternal Gate, Eternal Golden Light, and Blood River Immortal Technique, as well as the Polar Moon Holy Body.

However, the reincarnation divine general has mastered the six reincarnation techniques, which ranks second on the list of chaotic supernatural powers, and Xiao Yue's endless sinking may not be able to help the reincarnation supernatural generals.

Because the reincarnation god who has practiced the six reincarnation techniques, his soul is protected by the six reincarnations, and it is difficult to shake the six reincarnations even if he is endlessly sinking, so at most it will cause a little trouble to the reincarnation gods.

Therefore, to a certain extent, the reincarnation god general restrained Xiao Yue instead.

But Xiao Yue has too many magical powers, and this point crushes the reincarnation god general.

Because of this, it's really hard to say which of the two of them wins and who loses.

However, what shocked everyone was that Xiao Yue had not started the game yet, so she directly chose to admit defeat.

"Little junior brother, just now you sent a message to your wife, and then she admitted defeat, why? According to my estimate, your wife still has a great chance of winning!"

"Because of the Six Paths of Reincarnation!"

Ye Tian sighed.

"How is the Six Paths of Reincarnation Technique?" Long Hai Zhenjun was stunned, but quickly reacted and completely understood.

Above the void.

A group of Dao Ancestors were also discussing.

"Xiao Yue actually admitted defeat, it's a pity!"

She had to admit defeat, because she couldn't defeat the Reincarnation Divine General, not only because of the Endless Sinking and being restrained, but most importantly, it was difficult for her to block the Six Reincarnation Techniques! If she wasn't reincarnated through the Reincarnation Seed, then maybe there was still hope to win the Reincarnation Divine General. But she used the reincarnation seed to reincarnate, and now in this life, she has not completely gotten rid of the power of the reincarnation seed, unless she transcends into the realm of destiny and uses the power of detachment to get rid of the power of the reincarnation seed. Otherwise, the reincarnation god will use the six reincarnation techniques, which will directly affect Xiao Yue, and Xiao Yue's strength is estimated to only be thirty percent, or even less than thirty percent. "

"Reincarnation Seed! I see, I almost forgot that the Six Paths of Reincarnation Technique has a great impact on reincarnated people, unless I transcend and step into the Heavenly Mandate Realm or step into the level of True Ancestor and Dao Ancestor in the future, I can completely get rid of this influence! This is also a flaw of reincarnation, but I didn't expect that someone really mastered the Six Paths of Reincarnation!"

"Xiao Yue is terrible, but in terms of potential in the future, Xiao Yue is still better!"

As Xiao Yue admits defeat, the reincarnation god will get the first place.

Xiao Yue was very satisfied with this result, and Ye Tian was also very satisfied.

Although the original goal was to be first, it was good to be able to finish second.

Although the gap between the rewards of the first and second is probably very large, no matter how big the opportunities and treasures given by the Dao Ancestors are, they can't beat the quota of the Talent Ancestor Pool.

Being able to get a spot is the biggest reward!
